character.name: Full-body character reference sheet of
character.prompt: Full-body character reference sheet of a single Janissary soldier, standing at attention on a flat neutral grey background with even studio lighting, no environment. Male, late 20s, lean athletic build, light olive complexion, sharp cheekbones, prominent nose, thick well-groomed mustache with clean-shaven chin, dark brown hair cropped short beneath a tall white bork headdress with a polished brass holder and a single white plume. Wearing a deep crimson wool kaftan open at the chest to show a white linen undershirt, a leather sash bound tight at the waist holding a curved yataghan sword in a brass-trimmed scabbard, dark blue sirwal trousers loose to the knee, brown leather knee-high boots. A wooden-handled matchlock musket rests vertically against his right shoulder. Minimal ornamentation — this is a common soldier, not an officer. Expression neutral, alert, disciplined. Symmetrical A-pose, front-facing, evenly lit from three-point light rig, no cast shadow on background. Hyperrealistic, 8K, clean character design sheet style, no background detail, no environment.
